name: BLIK Poland Instant Payment API
what_it_does: BLIK Poland instant payment REST API (via PSP gateway integration) for Polish e-commerce merchants and service providers to accept payments using BLIK 6-digit codes generated by consumer banking apps, enabling instant bank-account-direct payment without card details entry across all major Polish banks covering 14M+ active BLIK users with the highest payment conversion in Poland. Enables AI agents to manage BLIK checkout initiation for Polish instant payment automation, handle 6-digit BLIK code collection for payment authorization automation, access payment status polling for BLIK confirmation automation, retrieve transaction verification for Polish payment reconciliation automation, manage refund processing for BLIK payment reversal automation, handle BLIK One Click for registered device payment automation, access payment webhook for BLIK event notification automation, retrieve BLIK payout for marketplace disbursement automation, manage BLIK QR for in-store payment automation, and integrate BLIK through PSP gateways (PayU, Przelewy24, Stripe, Adyen) for end-to-end Polish instant bank payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting BLIK 6-digit code payments from Polish consumers for e-commerce checkout automation agents
Enabling BLIK One Click repeat payment for returning Polish customer automation agents
Processing BLIK QR in-store payments for Polish retail and restaurant POS automation agents
Receiving BLIK payment confirmation webhooks for Polish marketplace order fulfillment agents
not_for: Non-Polish markets (BLIK is Poland-only PLN payment method)
Direct BLIK network integration (BLIK is only accessible via PSP/payment gateway)
International cross-border payments (BLIK is domestic PLN only)
best_when: A Polish e-commerce merchant or service wanting AI agents to accept BLIK 6-digit code payments from Poland's 14M+ BLIK users through a PSP gateway integration, achieving the highest conversion rate in Poland.
avoid_when: BLIK IS NOT A DIRECT API — PSP GATEWAY REQUIRED: BLIK does not provide direct merchant API; automated direct BLIK connection creates no endpoint to call; automated BLIK acceptance requires integration with PSP supporting BLIK (PayU, Przelewy24, Stripe PL, Adyen). 6-DIGIT CODE HAS 2-MINUTE EXPIRY: BLIK code expires in 2 minutes; automated payment with expired code creates code_expired error; automated checkout must prompt consumer to generate fresh code and complete quickly. PAYMENT CONFIRMATION IS ASYNC: BLIK payment confirmation requires consumer to approve in banking app; automated synchronous payment confirmation creates premature success assumption; automated must poll payment status or await webhook for BLIK approval. BLIK ONE CLICK REQUIRES PRIOR AGREEMENT: BLIK One Click (saved device) requires separate consumer consent and device registration; automated One Click assumption without prior registration creates no_agreement error.

auth.notes: BLIK accessed via PSP gateways with gateway-specific OAuth/API key auth. REST API with JSON. Warsaw, Poland. BLIK established 2015 by Polski Standard Płatności (PSP) consortium of Polish banks. Products: BLIK code, BLIK One Click, BLIK QR, BLIK transfers, BLIK cheque. Accessible through: PayU PL, Przelewy24, Stripe Poland, Adyen, PayPo. NBP-regulated. 14M+ active BLIK users. 95%+ Polish mobile app bank coverage. Poland's dominant mobile payment method. Not available outside Poland.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox via PSP gateway (PayU, Przelewy24) free; production requires Polish merchant account
pricing.paid_tiers: Gateway-specific: typically 0.5-1.5% per BLIK transaction; lower than card rates
pricing.notes: Warsaw PL. PSP consortium (Polish banks). Gateway-accessed. PLN. NBP regulated. Lower fee than cards.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per PSP gateway credentials; confirmation async (consumer approval in bank app); webhooks via gateway

known_agent_gotchas: PSP GATEWAY IS REQUIRED — NO DIRECT BLIK API: BLIK payment network has no direct merchant API; automated BLIK integration requires PSP gateway (PayU, Przelewy24, Stripe PL); automated direct BLIK endpoint creates non-existent connection

6-DIGIT CODE EXPIRES IN 2 MINUTES: BLIK code is time-limited (2 min) generated by consumer's banking app; automated delayed code submission creates code_expired rejection; automated checkout UX must prompt consumer to generate code and complete payment quickly

PAYMENT CONFIRMATION IS CONSUMER-ASYNC: BLIK payment requires consumer to approve in banking app (can take seconds to minutes); automated synchronous confirmation immediately after code submission creates premature success; automated must poll payment status or await webhook

BLIK ONE CLICK REQUIRES DEVICE AGREEMENT: BLIK One Click (repeat payment without code) requires prior consumer consent and device registration with merchant; automated One Click without prior agreement creates no_agreement error
POLISH MERCHANT REQUIRED: BLIK accepting merchant must have Polish commercial registration; automated foreign entity BLIK acceptance creates eligibility rejection at PSP onboarding
agent_readiness.security_notes: Polish instant payment. NBP, PSD2, GDPR. PSP gateway OAuth/API key. PL. Bank account and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Poland instant payment. NBP, PSD2, GDPR. PSP OAuth. PL. Bank account and payment data.
